name: agentskills
description: Adam Daniel's reusable agent skills, packaged as installable Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: adam-writing-style
plugins.description: Write in Adam Daniel's voice — warm, direct, em-dash-friendly, free of corporate buzzwords.

plugins.name: compare-pdfpairs
plugins.description: Compare name.pdf + name<suffix>.pdf pairs for identical printouts and text diffs, to safely delete redundant duplicates.

plugins.name: debug-github-workflows
plugins.description: Diagnose GitHub Actions workflow failures: read real logs and annotations, catch false-success patterns, and fix common CI failure modes.

plugins.name: fastmail
plugins.description: Automate Fastmail email workflows (search, read, compose, reply) via a local Claude-in-Chrome browser session.

plugins.name: github-actions-repo-settings
plugins.description: Configure GitHub repository/org settings to enforce Actions security policies (SHA pinning, fork-PR approval).

plugins.name: launch-wsl-claude-session
plugins.description: Launch a detached, interactive Claude Code session inside WSL — from a Windows host or from inside WSL — in a chosen folder, optionally remote-controllable or seeded with an initial prompt.

plugins.name: migrate-claude-memory
plugins.description: Inventory, clean up, and migrate Claude Code auto-memory stores between machines and into git-tracked repos.

plugins.name: pin-actions-to-sha
plugins.description: Audit and pin every GitHub Actions `uses:` reference to a full commit SHA with a dated version comment.

plugins.name: rename-pdfs
plugins.description: Rename already-searchable PDFs to descriptive, date-prefixed names proposed from each file's own content.

plugins.name: review-bash-ci-reliability
plugins.description: Review bash scripts for CI reliability: silent-failure patterns, error propagation gaps, and environment assumptions.

plugins.name: sync-cc-settings-between-wsl-and-windows
plugins.description: Reconcile Claude Code settings.json between a Windows home and a WSL home, merging per property.

plugins.name: sync-skills
plugins.description: Sync local skill folders to claude.ai via the upload-skill API using the browser's authenticated session.

plugins.name: wj-next-break
plugins.description: Answer questions about the current/next class period, break, lunch, or bell at Walter Johnson High School.

plugins.name: workflow-path-audit
plugins.description: Audit GitHub Actions workflows for salient-path conditionals so they skip with success on irrelevant changes.

plugins.name: writing-adrs
plugins.description: Write lightweight Nygard-style Architecture Decision Records under docs/decisions/, bootstrapping the folder, template, and index when missing.
